mapper.sql: user_id, username, display_name, email, password_hash, role, status, bio, avatar_url, banner_url, community_level, experience_points, last_login_reward_date, reputation_score, created_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, display_name, email, password_hash, role, status, bio, avatar_url, banner_url, community_level, experience_points, last_login_reward_date, reputation_score ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{status}, #{bio}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bannerUrl}, COALESCE(#{communityLevel}, 1), COALESCE(#{experiencePoints}, 0), #{lastLoginRewardDate}, #{reputationScore} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, display_name = #{displayName}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, banner_url = #{bannerUrl}, community_level = #{communityLevel}, experience_points = #{experiencePoints}, last_login_reward_date = #{lastLoginRewardDate}, reputation_score = #{reputationScore} WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE users SET community_level = LEAST(99, FLOOR((experience_points + #{experienceDelta}) / 100) + 1), experience_points = experience_points + #{experienceDelta}, last_login_reward_date = #{rewardDate} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (last_login_reward_date IS NULL OR last_login_reward_date <> #{rewardDate})
